judgment.summary: Low valuation multiples and high cash reserves are offset by significant earnings contraction and negative free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.62 vs an estimate of 5.74 (miss), with the next earnings date on 2026-05-13.
positives: Forward P/E 14.74 and PEG ratio 0.82 — suggests attractive valuation relative to growth.
Price/Sales (TTM) 0.34 — indicates the stock is trading at a low multiple of revenue.
Total cash of $338.11B — provides a massive liquidity cushion.
Analyst growth estimate for current FY is 86.7% — suggests a significant expected recovery.
negatives: Earnings growth -70.9% — reflects a sharp decline in recent profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) -$26.12B — shows significant negative cash generation over the last year.
Last reported EPS missed estimates by -89.2% — indicates a massive earnings surprise to the downside.
Quick ratio 0.73 — suggests potential short-term liquidity constraints.

news.paragraph: Alibaba's recent Q4 2026 earnings report serves as a primary catalyst, presenting a mixed outlook for the company. Although the firm reported explosive growth in its cloud and AI sectors, overall revenue missed analyst forecasts and earnings were impacted by the high costs of its AI initiatives. Consequently, the stock has seen a retreat as investors weigh strong technological momentum against revenue and profitability concerns.
